sections.title: Section 4
sections.description: A lecture about the history of glass-making.

question_groups.instructions: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
question_groups.title: History of Glass-Making
question_groups.note_text:
Origins:
• First produced around ___31___ BC in Mesopotamia
• Early glass was coloured due to ___32___ in the raw materials

Roman period:
• Romans discovered the ___33___ technique, enabling mass production
• Glass became available to ___34___ people, not just the wealthy

Medieval Europe:
• Stained glass used mainly in ___35___ buildings
• The colour red was the most ___36___ to produce

Modern developments:
• Float glass process invented in ___37___
• Process involves floating molten glass on a bed of ___38___
• Result: perfectly ___39___ surface without polishing
• Now used in ___40___% of all flat glass production worldwide
